allow: Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const line = chunks.join\(''\); try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); const content = obj?.message?.content || []; content.forEach\(c => { if \(c.type === 'text'\) { // Print the part after STEP 6 const text = c.text; const idx = text.indexOf\('back-upper-back'\); if \(idx > 0\) console.log\(text.substring\(idx, idx + 5000\)\); } }\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('err', e.message\); } }\); ")
